review_text: Solid but not spectacular. Attorney Brooks handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
Mixed experience with this law office. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
Three stars feels right. Ms. Goldstein was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
I got what I hired the practice for but the process was bumpier than it needed to be. A few miscommunications along the way made things stressful. Outcome was fine.
I hired Ms. Huang for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
The good: Mr. Kim clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
this law office handled my matter adequately. The attorney was knowledgeable but seemed stretched thin between cases. Not bad, not great — right in the middle.
Average experience. Mr. Kim was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
Communication was hit or miss with this firm. When I could get someone on the phone they were helpful, but getting to that point sometimes took longer than it should. Results were acceptable.
Ms. Chen did okay work on my case. Nothing exceptional but nothing terrible either. Communication was average and the outcome was roughly what I expected. Decent but not memorable.
The good: Ms. Chen clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
Three stars feels right. Attorney Davis was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
I hired Ms. Reyes for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
Average experience. Mr. Harris was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
owner_response: We take billing transparency seriously and are happy to walk through any invoice in detail. Please don't hesitate to reach out.

owner_response: Thank you for this feedback — communication consistency is an area we are actively improving across the board.
